Heyyy, I’m Christi Agnes 💗

Birmingham girl with soft-lux energy, iced coffee addiction, late-night music sessions & random little disappearances when life gets too loud ✨

I’m usually somewhere between romanticising my life, stacking my money quietly, and planning my next escape without telling anyone 😌

People always think they’ve figured me out fast… they never do.

I can be calm one minute, sarcastic the next, then suddenly deep in a conversation at 2am about life, music, or crazy experiences 👀

Lowkey curious what kinda vibe I give off to people here…

So tell me:
What age do you THINK I am? 🤍

No cheating obviously.

If your guess is good, maybe I’ll tell you something interesting about me.
English only though x

And if you’ve got good energy, confidence, and actual personality…
my DMs might be worth the risk 💌

Hey I wants a Fortnite UEFN tycoon/grinder map inspired by another map they shared, but with a unique brainrot/meme Roblox-style theme.

Main things we want:

Around 8 different floors/levels that loop infinitely with increasing rewards and difficulty
Farming area outside the building
Wheel/spin reward system
Rebirth system with teleporters
Leaderboards
Boss fights
Underground locked/key areas
Very important: Auto-collector purchase/upgrade system

And we need more about the game mechanics and progression systems than copying the exact map design.



If you can do it send me Message
